title: nothing-new-under-the-sun: stamped prior-art research Invoked Agent for scoping
description: Author a lightweight Invoked Agent, stamped by default in the Template, that runs during scoping (between PRD and issue breakdown). Invocation contract: a PRD id/path plus pointers to the relevant parts of the codebase. Behavior: web-search for prior art on the problem the PRD solves — YouTube videos, Stack Overflow threads, Medium/blog articles, reference implementations — and return a digest of existing approaches and common gotchas in the candidate implementation paths, each with its source. It informs scoping only: it does not decide, edit files, or gate work. Authored from the framework's agent-def shape; stamped as invariant layout (Scaffolder copies it; package-qa contract). Src-First; root Instance mirrors so this team can use it immediately.
acceptance_criteria: The agent definition ships in the Template and is stamped into a fresh Instance
Invoked with a PRD and codebase pointers, it returns a sourced digest of prior art and implementation gotchas
It performs no file edits and issues no verdicts
alignment PASS on the definition; package-qa passes on the stamp contract
Demonstrated once against PRD-007 itself on this Instance
fix: Definition stamped + alignment PASS + TL approved; acceptance demo run against PRD-007, digest persisted to .excn/research/prior-art-prd-007.md; stamp contract package-qa PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks, added scope at execution kickoff). Chartered definition addition — alignment-gated, Team-Lead-approved (ADR-0004 path).
